title: rubus lasiandrus
intro: Rubus lasiandrus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or the Tibetan raspberry, is a type of shrub that belongs to the rose family and is native to the Himalayan region. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus lasiandrus include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues, making it a valuable resource for natural remedies. In terms of herbal preparations, Rubus lasiandrus can be found in various forms, including dried leaves and roots, which can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures.
